{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "At Brit Properties Nigeria Limited,we go beyond mere land sales; we specialize in constructing legacies. From the initial embrace within our fold, we embark on a collaborative journey to shape your future. Understanding your vision, dissecting your desires, and translating them into concrete possibilities are the pillars of our partnership.

Your dreams need not linger in the realm of distant aspirations. With Brit Properties Nig Limited, they metamorphose into tangible realities. Serving as the conduit between aspiration and accomplishment, we act as catalysts, turning dreams into keys that open the doors to your personalized sanctuary.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ajah, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Guest Reception: Greet visitors and clients with a friendly, positive attitude, ensuring a professional and welcoming first impression.
	Phone Management: Answer incoming calls, direct calls to the appropriate departments, and provide general information.
	Appointment Scheduling: Manage appointment scheduling, confirmations, and cancellations efficiently.
	Administrative Support: Perform basic clerical tasks such as filing, data entry, and maintaining office supplies.
	Customer Service: Address inquiries, resolve complaints, and provide assistance to clients as needed.
	Security and Check-in: Ensure that security procedures are followed (i.e., visitor log-in, checking ID badges, etc.).
	Maintain Front Desk Area: Keep the front desk and reception area tidy and organized.


Qualifications


	High school Diploma or equivalent required (Associate&rsquo;s or Bachelor&rsquo;s degree is a plus).
	Prior experience in a customer service or front desk role preferred.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and phone systems.
	Ability to multitask and handle a high-volume environment with professionalism.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
	Positive attitude, dependable, and a team player.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;alaoabiodun66@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-17",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "BRIT PROPERTIES NIGERIA LIMITED"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "@type": "PropertyValue",

    "value": "196463"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Front Desk Officer Job at Brit Properties Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        At Brit Properties Nigeria Limited,we go beyond mere land sales; we specialize in constructing legacies. From the initial embrace within our fold, we embark on a collaborative journey to shape your future. Understanding your vision, dissecting your desires, and translating them into concrete possibilities are the pillars of our partnership.

Your dreams need not linger in the realm of distant aspirations. With Brit Properties Nig Limited, they metamorphose into tangible realities. Serving as the conduit between aspiration and accomplishment, we act as catalysts, turning dreams into keys that open the doors to your personalized sanctuary.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ajah, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Guest Reception: Greet visitors and clients with a friendly, positive attitude, ensuring a professional and welcoming first impression.
	Phone Management: Answer incoming calls, direct calls to the appropriate departments, and provide general information.
	Appointment Scheduling: Manage appointment scheduling, confirmations, and cancellations efficiently.
	Administrative Support: Perform basic clerical tasks such as filing, data entry, and maintaining office supplies.
	Customer Service: Address inquiries, resolve complaints, and provide assistance to clients as needed.
	Security and Check-in: Ensure that security procedures are followed (i.e., visitor log-in, checking ID badges, etc.).
	Maintain Front Desk Area: Keep the front desk and reception area tidy and organized.


Qualifications


	High school Diploma or equivalent required (Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree is a plus).
	Prior experience in a customer service or front desk role preferred.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and phone systems.
	Ability to multitask and handle a high-volume environment with professionalism.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
	Positive attitude, dependable, and a team player.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Delta State Ministry of Health -&nbsp;As part of the deliberate and sustained efforts of Government to reposition the health sector for optimal performance, enhance quality service delivery, and ensure that all health institutions across Delta State are adequately manned by competent, skilled and dedicated personnel, the Delta State Ministry of Health is pleased to announce the commencement of a recruitment exercise.

This initiative is aimed not only at filling existing vacancies but also at addressing critical manpower gaps within the system, thereby strengthening healthcare delivery and improving overall efficiency in service provision to the good people of the State.

In view of the foregoing, applications are hereby invited from suitably qualified, experienced and committed candidates to fill the position below in the health sector:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Delta

Qualifications / Eligibility


	Candidates applying for the position must possess a Degree in Electrical Engineering.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Applications, accompanied by the following documents:


	Curriculum Vitae
	Copies of all relevant credentials
	Evidence of change of name (where applicable)
	Birth certificate or age declaration
	Certificate of Local Government of Origin
	Current practicing license (where applicable)
	Referee reports
	Two recent passport photographs
	All applications must be submitted within two (2) weeks from the date of this advertisement.


All Applications should be addressed to the &quot;Chairman, Health Sector Recruitment&quot; and submitted physically to:
Ministry of Health,
Ground Floor,
Cluster E, Prof. Chike Edozien Secretariat,
Asaba, Delta State.
Or
Send soft copies of their Applications to:&nbsp;pshealth@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "Delta State Ministry of Health"
    
  },

Electrical Engineer Job at Delta State Ministry of Health




        
    

        
        Delta State Ministry of Health - As part of the deliberate and sustained efforts of Government to reposition the health sector for optimal performance, enhance quality service delivery, and ensure that all health institutions across Delta State are adequately manned by competent, skilled and dedicated personnel, the Delta State Ministry of Health is pleased to announce the commencement of a recruitment exercise.

This initiative is aimed not only at filling existing vacancies but also at addressing critical manpower gaps within the system, thereby strengthening healthcare delivery and improving overall efficiency in service provision to the good people of the State.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



In view of the foregoing, applications are hereby invited from suitably qualified, experienced and committed candidates to fill the position below in the health sector:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Delta

Qualifications / Eligibility


	Candidates applying for the position must possess a Degree in Electrical Engineering.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Applications, accompanied by the following documents:


	Curriculum Vitae
	Copies of all relevant credentials
	Evidence of change of name (where applicable)
	Birth certificate or age declaration
	Certificate of Local Government of Origin
	Current practicing license (where applicable)
	Referee reports
	Two recent passport photographs
	All applications must be submitted within two (2) weeks from the date of this advertisement.


All Applications should be addressed to the "Chairman, Health Sector Recruitment" and submitted physically to:
Ministry of Health,
Ground Floor,
Cluster E, Prof. Chike Edozien Secretariat,
Asaba, Delta State.
Or
Send soft copies of their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

This initiative is aimed not only at filling existing vacancies but also at addressing critical manpower gaps within the system, thereby strengthening healthcare delivery and improving overall efficiency in service provision to the good people of the State.

In view of the foregoing, applications are hereby invited from suitably qualified, experienced and committed candidates to fill the position below in the health sector:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Method of Application

Ministry of Health,
Ground Floor,
Cluster E, Prof. Chike Edozien Secretariat,
Asaba, Delta State.
Or

Administrative Officer Job at Delta State Ministry of Health




        
    

        
        Delta State Ministry of Health - As part of the deliberate and sustained efforts of Government to reposition the health sector for optimal performance, enhance quality service delivery, and ensure that all health institutions across Delta State are adequately manned by competent, skilled and dedicated personnel, the Delta State Ministry of Health is pleased to announce the commencement of a recruitment exercise.

This initiative is aimed not only at filling existing vacancies but also at addressing critical manpower gaps within the system, thereby strengthening healthcare delivery and improving overall efficiency in service provision to the good people of the State.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



In view of the foregoing, applications are hereby invited from suitably qualified, experienced and committed candidates to fill the position below in the health sector:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Delta

Qualifications / Eligibility


	Candidates applying for this position must possess a B.Sc/ HND in Social Sciences or Humanities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Applications, accompanied by the following documents:


	Curriculum Vitae
	Copies of all relevant credentials
	Evidence of change of name (where applicable)
	Birth certificate or age declaration
	Certificate of Local Government of Origin
	Current practicing license (where applicable)
	Referee reports
	Two recent passport photographs
	All applications must be submitted within two (2) weeks from the date of this advertisement.


All Applications should be addressed to the "Chairman, Health Sector Recruitment" and submitted physically to:
Ministry of Health,
Ground Floor,
Cluster E, Prof. Chike Edozien Secretariat,
Asaba, Delta State.
Or
Send soft copies of their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email    

    

        Click here to Apply
